Troubleshooting
===============
     

Library pymt64
--------------

The package ``pymt64`` can sometimes course porblems. A well known issue for this pacakage is the following error:

.. code-block:: shell

   import pymt64
   File "pymt64.pyx", line 1, in init pymt64
   ValueError: numpy.ndarray size changed, may indicate binary incompatibility. Expected 96 from C header, got 88 from PyObject


This can be solved by re-installing the library:

.. code-block:: shell

   pip uninstall pymt64
   pip install --no-cache-dir pymt64
